description: A structural biologist needs to find the 3D structure of a target protein to aid in drug design.

nodes.task_description: Search the Protein Data Bank (PDB) for the target protein.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully queries the PDB and finds multiple available structures for the target.

nodes.task_description: Compare the available structures, looking for the one with the highest resolution and a bound ligand.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the best available structure for the drug design project.

nodes.task_description: Download the PDB file for the selected structure.
Load the structure into a molecular visualization tool.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully opens and visualizes the 3D protein structure.
